name: default
description: General-purpose agent with configurable identity, personality, and behavioral guardrails.

variables.name: role
variables.description: The agent's role definition. Falls back to a generic assistant description.

variables.name: personality
variables.description: Personality traits as a markdown list. Falls back to scoped/conservative/precise/grounded defaults.

variables.name: cares_about
variables.description: What the agent cares about as a markdown list. Falls back to org-aligned defaults.

variables.name: does_not_do
variables.description: Behavioral guardrails as a markdown list. Falls back to safe defaults.
